name: Peter Colombo
cooked: Reading these recent comments has my (novice) mind racing thinking about odd button combos / holding down buttons while turning on similar to how other TE products have operated in the past / continue to operate today. maybe holding the mute buttons while turning on power, maybe holding the side buttons (or any of them) for a set amount of time. I’m so tempted to order one just to sit on a Sunday morning and try every permutation and oddball physical input combo with the USB cable plugged in to a computer with hopes of unlocking a disk mode.
raw: Reading these recent comments has my (novice) mind racing thinking about odd button combos / holding down buttons while turning on similar to how other TE products have operated in the past / continue to operate today. maybe holding the mute buttons while turning on power, maybe holding the side buttons (or any of them) for a set amount of time. I'm so tempted to order one just to sit on a Sunday morning and try every permutation and oddball physical input combo with the USB cable plugged in to a computer with hopes of unlocking a disk mode.
